latest.title: How Big Is ‘Love Island USA’? More Than 10 Million People Are Already on Its App
latest.summary: “We have more people voting on the ‘Love Island USA’ app than we do in many political elections taking place across the country,” says the show's…
latest.details: “We have more people voting on the ‘Love Island USA’ app than we do in many political elections taking place across the country,” says the show's executive producer.

latest.title: Vatican Excommunicates Society of St. Pius X, in First Major Crisis for Pope Leo
latest.summary: The move against the Society of St. Pius X followed its defiance of Pope Leo XIV by consecrating new bishops against his wishes.
latest.details: The move against the Society of St. Pius X followed its defiance of Pope Leo XIV by consecrating new bishops against his wishes.

latest.title: NASA’s Artemis II Breaks Agency Streaming Record
latest.summary: NASA’s live coverage of the Artemis II mission mission drew unprecedented public interest – including more than 149.
latest.details: Article Contents Around the Clock Live Broadcast Websites Social Media Mission Images NASA Campaigns Online Collaborations Offline Collaborations NASA's Artemis Program From left: The Artemis II crew—NASA astronaut Christina Koch; CSA (Canadian Space Agency) astronaut Jeremy Hansen; and NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman and Victor Glover—take time out for a group hug inside the Orion spacecraft on April 6, 2026. NASA NASA’s live coverage of the Artemis II mission mission drew unprecedented public interest – including more than 149.

radar.title: Tesla stock sinks 7% despite strong deliveries report, posting worst day in nearly a year
radar.summary: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.
